basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing with three year experience, Post-graduate degree in psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing
qualification.details: Graduate degree in psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing with three years of experience OR Post-graduate degree in psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing. Desirable: Prior experience of research work in the area of mental health and addictive disorders.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment is 19th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree in psychology, public health, social work, sociology, or nursing with three years of experience, or a Post-graduate degree in the same fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Project Technical Support III post is between 18 years and 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Technical Support III post at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 36400 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official AIIMS Delhi website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technical Support III post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Technical Support III post is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to check the official website for the most up-to-date information.
